risk: AOF could treat provider adapters as hidden authority channels without read/write boundaries, freshness checks, approval policy, escalation, or not-proven limits.
loss_boundary: No v8.1 release claim without provider adapter records, provider-adapter-audit, release-state integration, Mission Control projection, Council review, tests, and smoke.
evidence_plan: schemas commands audit release-state Mission Control docs runtime evidence npm test smoke
stop_conditions: stop if v8.1 claims provider semantic truth or external write safety
